display.purpose: Ahmed's name + role in the hero section. Used once per page.

display-section.purpose: Section headings: Work Index, Profile, Experience, Contact.

title.purpose: App card names, role titles, primary label inside content units.

eyebrow-mono.purpose: Technical signals only: version numbers, tech names, formatted dates. Max once per section.

body-small.purpose: Card descriptions, bio snippets, supporting text.

label.purpose: UI controls: button text, chip text, nav items. Sentence-case only.

folio-mono.purpose: App index numbers 01–42 in the release index. The folio label.

shadows.name: accent-glow
shadows.purpose: Primary button hover + active filter pills + focused inputs. Never at rest. Reduced-motion: instant, no transition.

shadows.name: modal-lift
shadows.purpose: Modals and drawers only. Separates overlay from tonal-layered page surface.

motion.name: entrance
motion.purpose: Section/row entrance animation. Stagger: 60ms per item.

motion.name: button
motion.purpose: Button pressed state — faster than hover for tactile feel.

motion.name: hairline
motion.purpose: Hairline scaleX reveal (separator lines, underline reveals).

motion.name: counter
motion.purpose: Count-up number animations (e.g. app count stat).

motion.name: stagger
motion.purpose: Per-item delay offset for staggered list entrances.

components.name: Primary Button
components.description: The one CTA that uses the emerald fill. Used for Download CV, Contact, Submit.
components.css: .ds-btn-primary { background: #3DF5A3; color: #04130C; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border: none; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 120ms ease-out, box-shadow 160ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-primary:hover { background: #56FFB4; box-shadow: 0 0 16px 0 rgba(61,245,163,0.25); } .ds-btn-primary:active { background: #2BD98C; box-shadow: none; } .ds-btn-primary:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3DF5A3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Ghost Button
components.description: Secondary CTA. Used alongside primary when two actions are needed.
components.css: .ds-btn-ghost { background: transparent; color: #3DF5A3; padding: 14px 28px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border: 1px solid #3DF5A3; border-radius: 10px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease-out; } .ds-btn-ghost:hover { background: #0F2A20; } .ds-btn-ghost:focus-visible { outline: 2px solid #3DF5A3; outline-offset: 2px; }

components.name: Filter Chip
components.description: Category and platform filter pill in the app index toolbar.
components.css: .ds-chip-filter { background: #161B22; color: #C9D1D9; padding: 6px 14px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; border: 1px solid #222A33; border-radius: 8px; cursor: pointer; transition: background 160ms ease-out, color 160ms ease-out, border-color 160ms ease-out; } .ds-chip-filter:hover { border-color: #303A45; } .ds-chip-filter--active { background: #0F2A20; color: #3DF5A3; border-color: #3DF5A3; } .ds-chip-filter--active:hover { background: #0F2A20; box-shadow: 0 0 12px 0 rgba(61,245,163,0.2); }

components.name: Platform Chip
components.description: Display-only badge showing iOS / Android on an app index row.
components.css: .ds-chip-platform { display: inline-block; background: #161B22; color: #8B97A5; padding: 4px 10px; font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.4; border-radius: 999px; border: 1px solid #222A33; }

components.name: App Index Card
components.description: The primary content unit in the 42-app release index.
components.html: 01App NameiOS
components.css: .ds-card-app { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 12px; background: #10141A; border: 1px solid #222A33; border-radius: 16px; padding: 20px; transition: background 160ms ease-out, border-color 160ms ease-out; cursor: pointer; } .ds-card-app:hover { background: #161B22; border-color: #303A45; } .ds-card-app__folio { font-family: 'JetBrains Mono', monospace; font-size: 12px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.5px; color: #5A6470; min-width: 28px; } .ds-card-app__dot { width: 8px; height: 8px; border-radius: 50%; flex-shrink: 0; } .ds-card-app__name { font-family: 'Space Grotesk', sans-serif; font-size: 22px; font-weight: 600; line-height: 1.25; color: #E6EDF3; flex: 1; }

components.name: Text Input
components.description: Contact form field. Used in the contact section only.
components.css: .ds-input { width: 100%; background: #10141A; color: #E6EDF3; padding: 14px 16px; font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 17px; font-weight: 400; line-height: 1.65; border: 1px solid #222A33; border-radius: 10px; outline: none; transition: border-color 200ms ease-out, box-shadow 200ms ease-out; } .ds-input::placeholder { color: #8B97A5; } .ds-input:focus { border-color: #3DF5A3; border-width: 1.5px; box-shadow: 0 0 12px 0 rgba(61,245,163,0.125); } .ds-input[aria-invalid='true'] { border-color: #FF6B6B; } .ds-input:disabled { opacity: 0.4; cursor: not-allowed; }

components.name: Navigation Bar
components.description: Top sticky nav. Transparent at top, surface tint + blur on scroll.
components.html: WorkProfile
components.css: .ds-nav { display: flex; align-items: center; gap: 32px; padding: 0 64px; height: 64px; background: transparent; transition: background 300ms ease-in-out, backdrop-filter 300ms; } .ds-nav--scrolled { background: rgba(16,20,26,0.88); backdrop-filter: blur(12px); } .ds-nav__item { font-family: 'Inter', sans-serif; font-size: 13px; font-weight: 500; letter-spacing: 0.3px; color: #C9D1D9; text-decoration: none; padding-bottom: 4px; border-bottom: 2px solid transparent; transition: color 160ms ease-out, border-color 160ms ease-out; } .ds-nav__item:hover { color: #E6EDF3; border-bottom-color: #3DF5A3; } .ds-nav__item--active { color: #3DF5A3; border-bottom-color: #3DF5A3; }

narrative.overview:
This is a production terminal with a live index. The canvas is deep carbon (#0A0C10), nearly black but with a faint blue-teal tint that tells you a screen is on, not paper is blank. One electric emerald (#3DF5A3) pulses through it as the sole signal color — the kind of green that means process running, build passing, all 42 deployed. Everything else is structured neutral: layered surfaces in increasing lightness, monospaced folio numbers, and a restrained per-category hue system.

The layout reads like a versioned release index — dense, scannable, authoritative. Both dark and light themes are first-class. The dark default is deploy night. The light mode is morning review. Both express the same character.
keyCharacteristics: One signal accent (electric emerald) used sparingly — its rarity is the point
Per-category hues on index numbers, filter pills, and tag text only — never as fills
JetBrains Mono as engineering signal, not decoration
Choreographed entrance motion, then state-change only
Reduced-motion: opacity crossfade for all reveals

rules.name: The One Signal Rule
rules.body: The electric emerald appears on ≤10% of any given screen in full brightness. Seeing it means something is active, passing, or interactive. If it appears everywhere, it means nothing.

rules.name: The No-Fill Rule
rules.body: Category hues never fill areas larger than 24px × 24px. They are wayfinding dots, not palette colors.

rules.name: The Flat-By-Default Rule
rules.body: Every surface is flat at rest. No resting shadows on cards, chips, inputs, or navigation. Shadows are state responses, not decorative.

rules.name: The One Glow Rule
rules.body: The emerald glow is used on exactly one class of surface at any moment. Two glowing elements simultaneously dilute the signal.

rules.name: The Mono Restraint Rule
rules.body: JetBrains Mono is used in three roles: folio numbers, eyebrow signals, and version/date metadata. Never for body text, headings, or button labels.

rules.name: The Arabic Parity Rule
rules.body: All three families fall back to Cairo for Arabic glyphs. Both EN and AR locales render at identical hierarchy and weight.

rules.name: The Chip Grammar Rule
rules.body: Chips are the only components that use the pill radius. Everything else stays at ≤16px.

dos: Use Electric Emerald for exactly one interactive role per screen.
Express depth through tonal surface layers (#0A0C10 → #10141A → #161B22 → #1B222B).
Use JetBrains Mono exclusively for folio numbers, version/date metadata, and single-line eyebrow signals.
Gate all entrance animations behind prefers-reduced-motion.
Use start/end for all Flutter widget padding, margin, and alignment.
Render store buttons only when a store ID exists in apps.json.
donts: Don't use border-left > 1px as a colored accent stripe on any card or list row.
Don't use gradient text (background-clip: text + gradient).
Don't use glassmorphism decoratively — blur reserved for sticky nav only.
Don't use the warm-neutral body background band (OKLCH L 0.84–0.97, C < 0.06, hue 40–100).
Don't create hero-metric layouts (large number, small label, supporting stats, gradient accent).
Don't put eyebrow labels above every section heading.
Don't use numbered section markers (01/02/03) outside the app release index.
Don't place per-category hues on any surface larger than 24px × 24px.
Don't hardcode any color, font size, or spacing value in a Flutter widget.
Don't use Colors.* in widgets (except Colors.transparent).
